name: Disneyland Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, salt, shortening, and vanilla. Mix for 5 minutes.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating for an additional 3 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and cornmeal.
4. Gradually add half of the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Add half of the milk to the flour and sugar mixture, mixing thoroughly.
6. Add the remaining milk and flour mixture, beating until well blended.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 400°F (200°C) oven-safe baking dish.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
